title: Wynncraft - Fancy Professions Materials
description: Resprites all of Wynncraft's professions materials, aiming for readability with a bit of stylistic flair.
body:
# Requires reordering of server resource packs. 
<details>
<summary>Working Solutions and Technical Details</summary>
  
- https://modrinth.com/mod/serverpack-priority
- https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker
- https://modrinth.com/mod/wynntils (For Wynncraft's resource pack only. Requires you to log off Wynncraft and rejoin. Might require additional rejoins when switching worlds.)

The Fruma update has provided model .jsons for all unique materials, so you no longer need Variants-CIT for FancyProfsMats v2.0 and up (Variants-CIT is still a pretty nifty mod though). The pack will function as long as your client can reorder server resource packs.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>
Thanks so much to...

- Estecka, lead-dev of the Variants-CIT mod which backed the initial major phases of this project
- Profession Heaven [PROF] guild of Wynncraft
- Various members of the Wynncraft developer / content team
- Captain and Snorlax
- You! Harhar.

This wouldn't've been possible without you all.

Most of the plank and paper icons are generally edits I made of Wynncraft's (as of December 2025) own plank and paper icons. All of Wynncraft's material icons were also generally used as reference but not explicitly copied. Besides that, all art is by me.
</details>

FancyProfsMats applies a fresh look to all of Wynncraft's (play.wynncraft.com) materials used in professions content. See Gallery for pre-v2.0 icons. If you like this project, feel free to visit my Ko-fi! https://ko-fi.com/scott_pomegranate

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5131af80bc6c59792e1484aaf1a409fb7702a3dc.png)

<details>
<summary>Fruma Materials Showcase</summary>

![Fruma Materials Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02ca076933775e593fafc6c76da9d8f881827398.png)

</details>
